front.title: Use Cases for the Discovery of Agents, Workloads, and Named Entities

abstract.t:
This document describes broad categories of use cases for the Discovery of Agents, Workloads, and Named Entities (DAWN). The purpose of the document is to illustrate situations in which entities need to discover other entities.
This document does not define a discovery protocol, a registration procedure, a selection algorithm, or an agent-to-agent communication protocol.
